sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22619" key="gomfwth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γομφ-ωτήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n22619.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a ship-builder,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.31</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zelot.</author> </bibl>). </sense> <sense n="II" id="n22619.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">surgical instrument for excising bone</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:23:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.23.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
